Claim: Elon Musk made a Nazi salute at Trump’s inauguration
Origin/source: Selectively edited video on social media
Debunk summary: Gesture was taken out of context; no evidence of intentional salute

Claim: Hitler pardoned 8,000 Nazis on his first day, just like Trump pardoned Jan. 6 rioters
Debunk summary: False historical equivalence; claim misstates Hitler-era actions

Claim: 62% of online content in 2025 is false
Debunk summary: Statistic reported by a blog; methodology and sources require careful vetting

Claim: India legally defines fake news and will cancel journalist accreditation automatically
Debunk summary: Panel urged defining ‘fake news’ and exploring penal amendments; not automatic or finalized

Claim: Govt says most social media content is illegal; new rules already in force
Origin/source: Social media posts summarizing minister’s remarks
Debunk summary: Minister warned of serious threat and moves to tighten rules; not a blanket claim nor finalized rules

Claim: UK has mandated deepfake detection curriculum in all schools worldwide
Debunk summary: UK planning media/AI literacy in England; not global or mandated elsewhere

Claim: PIB debunked only a handful of fake news in five years
Debunk summary: PIB Fact Check received ~1.6 lakh queries, debunked 2,200+ items; volume indicates scale and limits
